# Test link projection update and queries
exec sh -c 'pinax init vault --title Vault --json > init.json'
validate-json-envelope init.json
validate-clean-stdout init.json

# Run index sync to populate index
exec sh -c 'pinax index sync --vault vault --json > sync.json'
validate-json-envelope sync.json
validate-clean-stdout sync.json

# Query backlinks to page-b using pinax note backlinks
exec sh -c 'pinax note backlinks page-b --vault vault --json > backlinks.json'
validate-json-envelope backlinks.json
validate-clean-stdout backlinks.json
grep 'notes/page-a.md' backlinks.json

# Query using pinax search with link-target
exec sh -c 'pinax search "Page A" --link-target notes/page-b.md --vault vault --json > search.json'
validate-json-envelope search.json
validate-clean-stdout search.json
grep 'notes/page-a.md' search.json

-- vault/notes/page-a.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_page_a
title: Page A
kind: reference
---

# Page A

Here is a link to [[page-b]].

-- vault/notes/page-b.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_page_b
title: Page B
kind: reference
---

# Page B

This is Page B.
